00020 
00021 package jelatine;
00022 
00023 import java.io.OutputStream;
00024 import java.lang.String;
00025 
00030 public class VMOutputStream extends OutputStream
00031 {
00032     private static final int STDERR = 0;
00033     private static final int STDOUT = 1;
00034 
00035     private int type;
00036 
00041     public VMOutputStream(String type)
00042     {
00043         if (type.equals("stderr"))
00044             this.type = STDERR;
00045         else if (type.equals("stdout"))
00046             this.type = STDOUT;
00047     }
00048 
00060     public void write(int b)
00061     {
00062         switch (type)
00063         {
00064             case STDERR:
00065                 write_to_stderr((byte) b);
00066                 break;
00067             case STDOUT:
00068                 write_to_stdout((byte) b);
00069                 break;
00070             default:
00071                 ;
00072         }
00073     }
00074 
00075     private static native void write_to_stderr(byte b);
00076     private static native void write_to_stdout(byte b);
00077 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
